hero.subtitle: Track your period with AI-powered predictions, log your mood and symptoms, and get personalized cycle insights — all in one beautiful app.

features.sectionSubtitle: Smart tracking tools designed to help you understand your cycle, anticipate changes, and feel in control.

cycle.title: Smart Cycle Predictions
cycle.desc: AI-powered predictions that learn your unique pattern over time. Know exactly when your next period, fertile window, and ovulation day are expected — with increasing accuracy each cycle.

mood.title: Mood & Symptom Logging
mood.desc: Track how you feel every day with our intuitive logging system. Record moods, physical symptoms, energy levels, and more — then discover patterns you never noticed before.

insights.title: Personalized Insights
insights.desc: Get AI-backed insights tailored to your unique cycle. Understand how your hormones affect your energy, mood, skin, digestion, and sleep — and get actionable advice for each phase.

setup.title: Easy Personalized Setup
setup.desc: Get started in under a minute. Our smart onboarding asks just a few questions to calibrate predictions to your body from day one. No complicated setup required.

why.title: Why Your Rhythm?
why.subtitle: Built with care, backed by science, and designed to put you first.

privacy.title: Privacy First
privacy.desc: Your data stays on your device. We never sell or share your personal health information.

design.title: Beautiful Design
design.desc: A gorgeous, intuitive interface that makes tracking your cycle feel effortless and enjoyable.

science.title: Science Backed
science.desc: Predictions and insights powered by peer-reviewed research and validated algorithms.

free.title: Free to Use
free.desc: All core features are completely free. Premium adds advanced insights for those who want more.

reviews.title: Loved by Women Worldwide
reviews.subtitle: Join thousands who trust Your Rhythm for cycle tracking.

items.name: Sarah M.
items.text: Finally a period tracker that actually learns my cycle. The predictions got accurate within two months, and the mood insights are incredible.

items.name: Jessica L.
items.text: I love how simple and beautiful this app is. The daily check-ins take 10 seconds, and the AI insights genuinely helped me understand my PMS patterns.

items.name: Maria K.
items.text: After trying 5 other trackers, Your Rhythm is the one that stuck. The fertility predictions helped me conceive, and I love that my data stays private.

cta.title: Start Tracking Your Cycle Today
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of women who understand their bodies better with Your Rhythm. Free to download, no account required.

footer.desc: Smart period tracker with AI-powered cycle predictions, mood logging, and personalized insights.

blog.subtitle: Tips, guides, and insights on cycle health, wellness, and fertility.
